corePackage.description: Centralized Reporting and Smart Integrations for Salesforce Quality.
releaseNotes: Salesforce connection updated to meet Connected App & ECA security requirements: PKCE, Refresh Token Rotation, and a 30-day idle token lifetime
Managed Salesforce connections stay compliant and keep refreshing under Salesforce's new security enforcement
Streamlined paste-the-code sign-in, with a background keep-alive that keeps idle connections valid
Existing Salesforce connections may need a one-time re-authorization after upgrading
Intelligent Test Case Generation: select additional linked Issue fields (Priority, Components, custom fields, and more) to enrich AI scenarios

plugins.description: Connect to your Jira org, import projects and issues into Provar Quality Hub, relate test cases to issues, and export defects as bugs back into Jira.
releaseNotes: Major refactor of the JIRA Sync Service for stability and performance, including cleanly separated DML and callout operations, bulkified SOQL queries, and elimination of redundant API calls during bidirectional sync
Cross-project parent, child, subtask, and linked issues are now detected and skipped silently rather than aborting the sync with an API error
Import All on large projects (tens of thousands of issues) now correctly imports every available record without silently dropping data
Parent issues imported via subtask payloads are no longer left as incomplete stub records and are automatically upgraded to fully populated records when re-encountered
Releases linked to newly created issues now sync to JIRA correctly on the first attempt instead of silently disappearing
Apostrophes and other HTML entities in descriptions are now properly decoded before being pushed to JIRA, eliminating stray encoded values like ' in JIRA work items
Bidirectional sync errors during JIRA updates are now captured in the issue's Sync Information field, including HTTP 400 responses that were previously swallowed
New trigger bypass utility suppresses unnecessary trigger side effects during JIRA pull syncs for faster, cleaner bulk imports
User and priority mappings are now cached in-memory per transaction to reduce SOQL usage across sync operations

plugins.description: Embed manual and automated testing into your release pipeline.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.

DevOps engineers can leverage 2 new Quality Pipelines (i.e. flow templates) to automatically trigger the execution in Provar Grid of Provar test cases directly or indirectly related to a work item when its status changes to 'In Review'
Fixed package installation issue.

plugins.description: Embed manual and automated testing into your release pipeline.
releaseNotes: Dynamic Provar Grid concurrency now retrieved from the Grid Admin API at runtime, replacing a hardcoded default of 10

plugins.description: Generate, plan, schedule, and run tests via Agentforce.
releaseNotes: Dynamic Provar Grid concurrency now retrieved from the Grid Admin API at runtime, replacing a hardcoded default of 1

plugins.description: Link Test Plans and Gearset CI Jobs to enable automated CI/CD with test automation embedded. Trigger and manage Gearset jobs from Provar Quality Hub to streamline releases, increase test coverage, and improve delivery quality without leaving Salesforce.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.
Trigger, Cancel, and Monitor Gearset Jobs from Provar Quality Hub.
Link Gearset CI Jobs to Provar Test Plan Schedules for a fully automated DevOps Pipeline.
Gearset Job syncing for keeping Gearset CI Job history and Provar Quality Hub job histories in sync.
Enhanced security for all SOQL/DML actions has been added.
Now publicly available on the AppExchange!

plugins.description: Relate test cases to branches and see their execution status per environment from within the branch itself.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.
Relate test cases to branches using Branch Test Case records.
Map Provar Quality Hub system records to Flosum org records to show test executions on branch records.
Fixed vulnerabilities from code scan tools.

plugins.description: Relate Test Cases and Test Plans to User Stories and Promotions, with real-time execution status and environment visibility directly within Copado.
releaseNotes: All packaged Copado flows now send email alerts for both successful and failed test schedule runs
Fixed environment name resolution in CopadoDataService that caused environment lookups to return null values during test plan schedule creation
Fixed flow namespace reference using incorrect field API name for Test Plan

plugins.description: Connect to QualityClouds and retrieve code scans so they can be analysed in Provar Quality Hub.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.
Fix callout to QualityClouds API to retrieve code scans.

plugins.description: Connect to Clayton and retrieve code scans so they can be analysed in Provar Quality Hub.
releaseNotes: This release updates references to the application name from Provar Manager to Provar Quality Hub.
Fix bug with handling of branch names.

plugins.description: Connect to your Azure DevOps org, import projects and work items into Provar Quality Hub, relate test cases to work items, and export defects as bugs back into Azure DevOps.
releaseNotes: Enhanced Azure DevOps Integration settings to include guided steps for project importing and priority & status mapping.

plugins.description: Provar Automation is an end-to-end test automation solution built for Salesforce.
releaseNotes: Summer '26 Compatibility
Microsoft Dynamics Application Support
AI Self-Healing (Beta)
Government Cloud Support for Agentforce Test APIs
Test Builder Mapping Performance Enhancements
Studio Apex Processing Performance Enhancements
Set API Bulk Data Operation Performance Enhancements
Microsoft Edge Browser Support on Linux
Logging Improvements
Security Enhancements
Bug Fixes and Stability Improvements

plugins.description: ProvarDX provides the capability to extend your Salesforce CLI to run Provar test cases, simplifies scratch org testing, and includes Provar MCP for AI client interfacing.
releaseNotes: provar_org_describe now reads the Salesforce object metadata Provar has already cached locally, so it returns the object's fields instead of an empty result.
Validation now flags a record verification left on the create screen after Save — at runtime Salesforce has moved to the saved record's view, so the check was looking at a page that no longer exists.

The UI screen-target format check now runs on test cases authored in Provar (previously it only saw hand-edited XML) and recognizes Visualforce and Lightning navigation parameters, so it no longer false-flags valid Salesforce CPQ and Billing screens.

plugins.description: This Jenkins plugin lets you set up and configure an environment to run Provar Automation tests with limited manual effort.
releaseNotes: Removed JDK 8 from build path in Jenkinsfile
Updated Jenkins BOM and Jenkins minimum version
